overall.description: A first-person perspective journey aboard a futuristic metro train in a cyberpunk metropolis. The clip begins inside the train car showing passengers and cyberpunk advertisements, then transitions to views of the dense urban landscape with towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, and elevated infrastructure passing by. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring characteristic neon-green lighting and dystopian architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train interior with green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: seated passenger slowly moving through the train car interior, observing other commuters

notable_agents.action: passenger wearing yellow shirt and pink pants sitting on bench looking forward
passenger with blue glowing jacket sitting on bench looking at handheld device

entered.detail: red and black poster advertising Night City Championship with gold emblem
yellow vertical metal support pole with hand grips
green upholstered bench seats along the train walls
green LED route information display above the train doors

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit cyberpunk metro train with green neon lighting. The camera moves slowly through the car past passengers seated on green benches, including a person in a yellow shirt and another with a glowing blue jacket. A prominent red advertisement poster for the Night City Championship is visible on the left wall near a yellow support pole.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train passing through dense cyberpunk city canyon

events.description: camera pans from interior to exterior view through train window revealing the cityscape
flying vehicle passes between buildings outside the window

agents.ego_description: looking out the train window at the passing futuristic cityscape and towering architecture

entered.detail: massive dark concrete and glass towers with industrial scaffolding and neon accents
large glowing holographic advertisements on building facades including colorful displays
metal support beams and track structures of the elevated railway system
futuristic aerial car flying between the skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to the exterior view through the train window, revealing a dense cyberpunk cityscape of massive skyscrapers and industrial architecture. The train moves along elevated tracks past digital billboards and concrete towers under an overcast hazy sky. Briefly, a flying vehicle can be seen navigating between the buildings as the train continues through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a futuristic train to the sprawling scale of a dystopian metropolis. It begins inside a dimly lit metro car, gliding past passengers in glowing attire and a red championship advertisement under a wash of green neon light. As the perspective shifts toward the window, the interior environment gives way to a dense urban canyon of massive skyscrapers and industrial concrete towers. The scene then expands into an exterior view of the cityscape under a hazy sky, passing digital billboards and a flying vehicle navigating the gaps between buildings.
